Wellington single & double-glazed aluminium joinery specialists

Sliding door and aluminium window repairs done right.

Single- and double-glazed aluminium joinery repairs for Wellington homes and rentals. We fix ranchsliders, awning windows, window handles, door handles, window locks, Yale hardware, drafts, leaks and sticking sashes across Wellington, Lower Hutt, Upper Hutt, Porirua and Kapiti.

  • Sliding door roller and track repairs
  • Awning stays, hinges and restrictors
  • Window handles, door handles and window locks
  • Draught and leak diagnosis
  • Mitre and sill reseals
  • Lock picking and cylinder replacement

What people actually search

High-intent repair pages built to rank and convert

Most visitors are not searching for a generic handyman. They are looking for aluminium window repairs, ranchslider repairs, leaking aluminium windows, window handles, Yale window locks and aluminium joinery repairs. These are the pages we want Google to understand and rank.

Aluminium window repairs Wellington

For bent awning stays, tired hinges, stiff latches, broken sash handles and Yale window locks.

Services

One team for every aluminium window and door issue

View full services →
Sliding / Ranchslider Door Repairs

Rollers replaced, tracks refurbished and panels re-aligned so aluminium sliders glide properly again.

Learn more →
Aluminium Window Repairs

Awning stays, hinges, sash handles, Yale window locks and latches serviced or replaced.

Learn more →
Aluminium Joinery Repairs

A broader page for single- and double-glazed aluminium joinery repairs across windows and doors.

Learn more →
Mitre & Sill Reseal

Proper in-frame reseals for leaking aluminium sliders and windows where water is tracking at corners and sills.

Learn more →
Handles, Locks & Hardware

Window handles, door handles, Yale hardware, wedges, keepers and other hard-to-match aluminium joinery parts.

Learn more →
Lock Picking & Lockout Entry

Non-destructive entry for compatible locks, plus cylinder replacement when a lock has failed.

Learn more →

FAQ

Questions we’re asked most

Do you repair single and double glazed aluminium joinery?

Yes. We work on both single- and double-glazed aluminium windows and doors, including rollers, seals, hardware and alignment.

Do you work across the whole Wellington region?

Yes. We cover Central Wellington, the Hutt Valley, Porirua, Petone and Kapiti every week.

How fast can you quote?

Send photos or describe the issue and we usually reply the same day. Emergency call-outs are available for stuck sliders.

Can you source older aluminium parts?

We stock common profiles and work with national suppliers to match out-of-production rollers, wedges, handles and locks.

What happens if glass breaks while you are working on it?

Most glass we work on is older and can have hidden edge damage or movement in the frame. We take care, but sometimes a pane can crack during normal repair or adjustment. If glass breaks during normal work on existing or aged glass, replacement glass and reglazing are charged at standard rates. If we clearly damage a sound pane through a mistake on our part, we will discuss a fair way forward. Nothing here affects your rights under New Zealand consumer law.

Can you fix leaks at the sill or mitred corners?

Yes. We open the joinery, back-seal the mitres, re-seal the sill and keep drainage paths clear. See our mitre and sill reseal service for details.

Do you offer lock picking?

Yes. We provide non-destructive entry for compatible locks and can replace cylinders if required. We only open doors with verified occupancy or authority.

Ready for smooth windows & sliders?

Call us or request a fast quote. Same-day replies during business hours.
